title: NERIST Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for Junior Project Officer Posts
description: The North Eastern Regional Institute of Science and Technology (NERIST) has officially released the vacancies of 01 Junior Project Officer Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their M.E./M. Tech can apply for the NERIST Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process,...
